title: The Last Message
script_text:
Scene: Riya receives a message from Arjun after five years.
Riya: Why now?
Arjun: Because I learned the truth.
Riya: What truth?
Arjun: The accident was not your fault.

title: Train Platform Farewell
script_text:
Scene: A crowded platform at dusk.
Mira: If I board now, I never come back.
Kabir: Then miss one train and stay.
Mira: You are late by six years.
Kabir: I can still be early for the rest.
